title: Orlando Heavy Rain
lead: Orlando is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.77. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is seeing significant rainfall, with a high humidity level of 86% and moderate winds of 17.8 km/h.
The heavy rain has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 12.2 GG, indicating high energy demand for cooling.
The Heating Degree Day (HDD) is 0.0 GG, reflecting the warm temperatures and low heating needs.
conclusion: Implement immediate emergency response protocols to mitigate the impact of the heavy rain.
